name: sharefiles
description: MERN stack file sharing application with PIN-based access

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.stop-dev: powershell -Command "$ports = 3000,5000; $connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $ports -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $processIds = $connections | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($processId in $processIds) { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
scripts.dev: npm run stop-dev && concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
